unresolved_issues: Online appendix is needed for exact log-linear model, Calvo pricing, price-markup shock, and full steady-state equations.
Several normalized FOCs are marked needs_review because they are derived from source primitives rather than copied from the missing appendix.
No implementation cross-check file exists for US_VGMP15.
Runtime validation was intentionally not performed.
